rag_rules: Match annex content to the correct owner kind: type-level contracts on component types, implementation-level bindings on component implementations.
Place implementation-scope AGREE content after the subcomponents and connections it depends on.
Use the input AADL model as the authority for owner names, features, connections, and properties, and preserve that structure during insertion.
generic_rules: Insert annex content without renaming owners or changing existing ports, subcomponents, connections, or property associations.
Preserve unrelated existing AADL and annex text; only add or merge the AGREE block in the matched owner scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE blocks use the wrapper annex agree {** ... **};.
Implementation-scope bindings such as assign belong only in implementation owners; guarantees belong in type owners.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in an implementation owner.
Do not place subcomponent paths or other implementation-only references inside a type-owner annex.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables chunk 1
